overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxury corporate building in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning at a zen garden entrance, moving through a sleek neon-lit interior with a central sculptural pillar, and emerging onto a panoramic terrace overlooking the futuristic cityscape of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury building entrance with zen garden

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the raked sand zen garden toward the modern building entrance

entered.detail: sculptural tree with twisted trunk growing from raked sand bed
dark modern facade with circular gold Arasaka logo
zen garden with concentric circle patterns raked into white gravel
narrow reflecting pool running parallel to the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at the entrance of a futuristic luxury building, approaching through a serene zen garden with a sculptural tree and raked sand patterns. The camera moves steadily toward the dark facade marked with a gold corporate logo.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark entrance hall with central sculptural pillar

events.description: passing from outdoor zen garden into dark interior entrance hall with red accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit entrance hall toward a central pillar structure with glowing base

entered.detail: tall dark rectangular column with glowing orange base and red neon accent lighting
red LED strips illuminating the edges of the floor and ceiling
highly polished black stone flooring reflecting the red lights

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dramatically lit interior space, transitioning from natural daylight to artificial red neon illumination. The path leads toward a massive central pillar with glowing orange elements, surrounded by polished dark marble floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass-walled viewing gallery overlooking futuristic cityscape

events.description: emerging from dark interior into bright space with floor-to-ceiling glass walls revealing city view
camera begins panning right to follow the glass wall and panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: walking along the glass wall admiring the panoramic view of the futuristic cityscape and reflecting pool

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling transparent glass wall overlooking the city
dense cluster of cyberpunk skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and neon signs
reflecting pool extending to the building edge with city reflections
tall vertical holographic displays floating above distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The space opens into a bright gallery with floor-to-ceiling glass revealing a stunning view of Night City. The camera moves along the glass wall, showcasing skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and an infinity pool reflecting the urban landscape, transitioning from artificial to natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace with palm trees overlooking the city

events.description: exiting the glass-walled interior onto an outdoor wooden terrace with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden terrace pathway lined with palm trees and large planters

entered.detail: polished wooden plank walkway with wet reflective surface
tall palm trees lining the terrace edge against the sky
large rectangular dark planters with dense green hedges

segments.scene_description: The camera exits onto a sunlit rooftop terrace with wooden decking, walking past palm trees and planter boxes. The futuristic cityscape remains visible in the background while the path curves back toward the building entrance, completing the circuit around the luxury structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene, naturalistic entrance through a high-tech corporate interior and out onto a panoramic urban terrace. It begins by gliding through a zen garden with raked sand and a sculptural tree, moving steadily toward a dark facade marked by a gold corporate logo. As the camera crosses the threshold, the natural daylight shifts into a dramatic interior of polished dark marble and artificial red neon illumination, centering on a massive pillar with glowing orange elements. The space then opens into a bright gallery where floor-to-ceiling glass reveals the sprawling skyscrapers and holographic billboards of Night City, transitioning the light once more as the camera moves past an infinity pool. Finally, the path leads out onto a sunlit rooftop terrace with wooden decking and palm trees, curving back toward the building while keeping the futuristic cityscape in view.
